name: Conception Reproductive Associates Colorado
message: For over 20 years, Conceptions Reproductive Associates of Colorado has been a pillar of success and hope for patients across Colorado and around the world with clinical outcomes that meet or exceed US benchmarks.   We have a huge amount of data from this company in our hands. Medical records, patient images, customer personal data, medical records, email correspondence, photos, and more. In the event that we do not come to an agreement, all data will be published.
